---
title: "delay()"
description: "delay: shift every value by `ms`, preserving all values + order. `mergeMap` keeps every inner timer live (equal `ms`, so they fire in arrival order)."
---

delay: shift every value by `ms`, preserving all values + order. `mergeMap` keeps every inner
timer live (equal `ms`, so they fire in arrival order).

## Import

```ts
import { delay } from "@graphrefly/ts";
```

## Signature

```ts
function delay(ms: number): Operator<S, S>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `ms` | `number` | Missing @param ms JSDoc. |

## Returns

`Operator<S, S>`
